steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The team took sterilized (empty of life) soil pots and added "slurries of live microbes" to them. The blank describes what they did to the pots: they filled them with living organisms.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
A. Precluded means prevented something from happening. You cannot preclude a pot — and the team was adding microbes, not blocking them. Eliminated.

B. Estimated means made an approximate calculation. The team was performing a physical action on the pots, not doing math. Eliminated.

C. Sanitized means cleaned to remove microbes. The soil was already sterilized — adding live microbes is the opposite of sanitizing. Eliminated.

D. Populated means filled with inhabitants or organisms. Substituting: "populated pots of sterilized soil with slurries of live microbes" — they stocked the empty soil with living organisms to grow the experiment. D is correct.
